Game: The Simpsons- Bart's Nightmare 1993-02-26T00:00:00-08:00 I can hear you saying: "Bart Simpson lost his homework? Suuure. What's his lame excuse this time?" Hey, I swear, I fell asleep! What a nightmare. Eight levels, each one scarier than the last, with villains like Homer Kong, Momthra, and Barney Gumble riding a pink elephant. I have to collect a page on each level, before I wake up and blow the whole assignment. You're my only hope, man. 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/6a4319ee-d7f7-40bc-a772-81d7d04502d4.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/cbfda9a6-6658-422c-a3fe-4159788cebeb.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/3f3dc8f1-d325-4996-aa97-04ac4f93207a.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/127b1aba-64d8-4736-ac75-09bdde2c8c5f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/bc0e0569-63d2-4e3a-a640-b316fb9edee6.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/69e0d60d-1b91-4d56-b02f-bdd9cbf8bc6c.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/a38067f9-18a3-404f-9280-93ef70becd2c.png 2 Not Rated Platform Sculptured Software Acclaim
